title: That Don't Impress Me Much
why_this_song: That Don't Impress Me Much by Shania Twain (1998) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I never knew a guy who carried a mirror in his pocket
And a comb up his sleeve, just in case
And all that extra hold gel in your hair ought a lock it
I've known a few guys who thought they were pretty smart
But you've got being right down to an art

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "you're" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "you're" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "don't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "don't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Oh-oh, you think you're something special
(Han han, uh-uh) that don't impress me much

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "That Don't Impress Me Much" was released in 1998. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "That Don't Impress Me Much" foi lançada em 1998. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "That Don't Impress Me Much" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "That Don't Impress Me Much" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "That Don't Impress Me Much" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "That Don't Impress Me Much" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?
